subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Thy letter addressed to his honour Áqá Siyyid Taqí hath been perused. From the events in those regions, the utmost joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق مکتوب شما بجناب آقا سید تقی ملاحظه گردید از حوادث آن جهات کمال روح
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God
